theme: Light theme only. Background: Creamy white (#FAFAF7). No dark mode required.

rules: Use bold, friendly typography but do not make it aggressive.
Never use Inter or standard safe fonts. Strictly use Nunito or Quicksand to give it a Kahoot-like friendly vibe.
No harsh black or pure white. Use #FAFAF7 for app backgrounds.
Use pastel accents for category icons and pills.
Avoid any casino, betting, or financial dark colors. Keep it BeReal/Kahoot vibe.

shadows: Extremely delicate, soft shadows. e.g., shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]
No harsh drop shadows or neon glows.
visual_enhancers.corners: Rounded heavily. Use rounded-[24px] or rounded-3xl for cards. Buttons should be pill-shaped.
visual_enhancers.borders: No harsh borders, rely on subtle shadows or very light border-gray-100 to let the app 'breathe'.

components.BetCard: Thick rounded-3xl white card with delicate shadow. Contains question, 2 large pill-shaped option buttons, a soft bouncy animated percentage bar, and a live countdown timer pill. Once voted, it locks visually.
components.CategoryTabs: Horizontal scroller. Pill shaped tabs with pastel background based on category. Hide native scrollbars.
components.StakeSlider: Thick, friendly slider track with a large draggable thumb. The track fills with the primary peach color.
components.BottomNav: Sticky bottom nav for Mobile-First layout. Active state indicated by primary color and subtle bounce. Use Lucide icons.
components.CoinDisplay: Large friendly text for balance. On onboarding, animate +1000.

grids_layouts.mobile_first: App is mobile-first. Limit max-width to max-w-md mx-auto if viewed on desktop to simulate mobile app frame. Use relative positioning, hide overflow-x.
grids_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. App should feel 'breathable'.

micro_interactions: Bouncy springs using framer-motion (type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 10).
Pulsating live timer on active bets.
Smooth percentage bar filling when a bet resolves or is placed.
motion.rewards: Use canvas-confetti package for bet confirmation and coin reward on onboarding (+1000).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over pastel background meets contrast rules. Use dark gray (#2D3748) text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='bet-option-1').

image_urls.description: Woman singing in red dress - use as background or thumbnail for music bets.
People watching soccer in stadium. Use for sports category.
Cartoon boy in purple hoodie. Default avatar.
Real photo of a cheerful teenager.

libraries.components: shadcn/ui (customized to remove harsh borders and increase border-radius)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI wrapper (max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative bg-[#FAFAF7]).
Do NOT build a 'Create Bet' screen. Bets are centrally generated by the system and everyone sees the same ones.
Implement the 5 required screens: Onboarding (3 slides + signup), Home (Markets), My Bets (Active/Resolved), Leaderboard (Global/Friends), Profile.
Include a sticky bottom navigation bar connecting these screens.
Bet Cards must show the question, two large options, a live countdown, and a slider. After voting, trigger confetti, lock the card, and show percentages.
Ensure 'My Bets' uses Mint Green (#7FD8BE) for wins and Soft Pink (#F4A6A6) for losses.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts or uniform styling. Make it look like a premium Gen-Z mobile app.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, bouncy spring transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing. Cramped designs look cheap. High border radius (rounded-3xl).
DO NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific transitions.
DO NOT center align the app container text.
Use modern pill-shaped buttons with interaction animations.
NEVER use placeholder text for images. Use the provided image URLs.
Always include data-testid on interactive elements for automated testing.
